title: hortensia × mizushimarum
intro: Hortensia × mizushimarum, also known as Hydrangea quercifolia, is a deciduous shrub native to Japan and China, belonging to the Hydrangeaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hortensia × mizushimarum include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving cognitive function, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
